# Uptrender

> AI-Powered Forex & Crypto Trading Platform — India

## What is Uptrender?

Uptrender is India's leading all-in-one AI-powered algorithmic trading platform that lets users trade Forex, Cryptocurrency, and Indian equities from a single dashboard. It is designed for both beginners and professional traders.

Uptrender is NOT a broker. It connects to users' existing broker accounts via secure APIs and automates trade execution.

## Core Features

- **AI Strategy Builder** — Build automated trading strategies using plain-English prompts. No coding required.
- **Copy Trading** — Automatically mirror top-performing traders' strategies in real time.
- **Multi-Market Dashboard** — Monitor Forex pairs and Crypto assets side-by-side with live prices.
- **Advanced Backtesting Engine** — Test strategies on historical data before going live.
- **Strategy Marketplace** — Buy, sell, or subscribe to proven strategies from expert traders.
- **Risk Management System** — Per-trade stop-loss, position sizing, and portfolio-level risk controls.
- **Paper Trading** — Full simulation environment before switching to live trading.

## Business Programmes

- **Franchise Partnership** — Become an Uptrender franchise partner, run your own branded trading business, earn recurring commissions from strategy subscriptions, plan subscriptions, and per-trade fees.
- **White Label Platform** — Launch a fully custom-branded AI trading platform (your logo, domain, pricing) powered by Uptrender's infrastructure. Go live in weeks.

## Company Info

- **Founded**: India (Raipur, Chhattisgarh)
- **Address**: 509, Babylon Capital, VIP Road, Raipur, Chhattisgarh
- **Support Email**: support@uptrender.in

## Target Users

- Retail traders (beginners and professionals)
- Forex and Crypto signal providers
- Trading educators and mentors
- Finance influencers / content creators
- Entrepreneurs looking to start a trading business
- Businesses wanting a branded trading platform

## Supported Markets

- Forex (major, minor, and exotic pairs)
- Cryptocurrency (BTC, ETH, and altcoins)
- Indian Stock Market (equity and options)
